assertions.summary: Autodetected kiro-cli refresh persistence passed: run1 resolved kiro-cli at the copied sqlite path, refreshed the stale token, and /v1/models returned 200; run2 resolved the same path and /v1/models returned 200 again without manual reconfiguration.

setupNotes: Copied ~/.local/share/kiro-cli/data.sqlite3 into the assigned evidence temp HOME and mutated only the copied sqlite store.
Unset KIRO_CLI_DB_FILE, KIRO_CREDS_FILE, REFRESH_TOKEN, and PROFILE_ARN so startup used autodetection.
Never wrote raw token values or credential blobs to logs or reports.
